note: Adapted from the old Blogger label rules. Blogger HTML and article structure are intentionally not reused.
rules: Use a stable broad shelf first: medium, domain, product family, or workflow area.
Add one concrete subject or technique tag.
Add one intent tag when it improves retrieval: tutorial, reference, review, research, implementation, recommendation.
Avoid one-off proper-noun tags unless the product, work, or person is likely to recur.
Keep tags useful for future roundup pages and search, not just descriptive decoration.
